TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Silong ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 11 buwan, 34 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 28 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 76%, Amis 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Silong hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Silong hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Silong hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Silong hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Silong hya' ga Qoyaw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēiloŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na s~…ēiloŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na s~…ēiloŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēiloŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēiloŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēllaw na s~…ēiloŇč ńßja Ē …£a qojaw. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Silong ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 11 buwan, 34 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 28 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 76%, Amis 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Silong hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Silong hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Silong hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Silong hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Silong hya' ga Qoyaw. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēiloŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na s~…ēiloŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na s~…ēiloŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēiloŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēiloŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēllaw na s~…ēiloŇč ńßja Ē …£a qojaw. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
